title: Telemetry schemas
description: Telemetry data points, lap segments, and ingestion job data shapes for the Dialed telemetry/ingestion service

dateTime.description: An ISO 8601 date-time string with timezone (e.g. 2026-03-18T12:00:00Z)

TelemetryPoint.description: A single 20Hz telemetry sample from an AiM or compatible data logger. Uses a hybrid wide table — the 13 core channels are real columns; additional logger channels overflow into extra_channels JSONB. Stored in a TimescaleDB hypertable partitioned by time.

time.description: Exact timestamp of this telemetry sample. Serves as the TimescaleDB hypertable partition key.

session_id.description: ID of the core.sessions session this data point belongs to

throttle_pos.description: Throttle position as a percentage (0 = closed, 100 = wide open)

lean_angle.description: Lean angle in degrees from vertical. Negative = left, positive = right.

front_brake_psi.description: Front brake line pressure in PSI

rear_brake_psi.description: Rear brake line pressure in PSI

fork_position.description: Front fork position in mm (0 = fully extended)

shock_position.description: Rear shock position in mm (0 = fully extended)

extra_channels.description: Additional logger channels not in the 13 core columns (e.g. TCS intervention level, wheelie sensor, secondary lambda). Keys are canonical channel names after alias resolution.

LapSegment.description: Computed lap boundary data for one lap within a session. Created by the ingestion pipeline from beacon or GPS data. The combination of session_id + lap_number is unique.

session_id.description: ID of the session this lap belongs to

lap_number.description: Sequential lap number within the session, starting at 1

start_time_ms.description: Lap start offset in milliseconds from the beginning of the session file

end_time_ms.description: Lap end offset in milliseconds from the beginning of the session file

lap_time_ms.description: Total lap duration in milliseconds (end_time_ms - start_time_ms)

beacon_start_s.description: Start beacon trigger time in seconds from file start. Null if lap was computed from GPS rather than a physical beacon.

beacon_end_s.description: End beacon trigger time in seconds from file start. Null if lap was computed from GPS rather than a physical beacon.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this lap segment was computed and stored

IngestionJob.description: Tracks the state of an async data ingestion job (CSV, OCR, or voice). Created when a file is uploaded, updated as the worker processes it, and polled or streamed via SSE by the client.

id.description: Unique ingestion job identifier, also used to construct the SSE stream URL

session_id.description: ID of the core.sessions session this ingestion job populates

source.description: The ingestion pipeline that will process this job. csv = AiM or compatible logger file; ocr = photo of a paper setup sheet; voice = audio note.

status.description: Current job state. 'pending' = queued in Redis; 'processing' = worker is active; 'complete' = data written; 'failed' = unrecoverable error.

result.description: Parsed output data once the job is complete. Shape varies by source: CSV jobs produce lap segments + channel summary; OCR/voice jobs produce extracted setup values pending user confirmation.

error_message.description: Human-readable error description if status is 'failed'

confidence.description: Confidence score (0–1) for OCR and voice extraction results. Null for CSV jobs. Low confidence results are flagged for user review.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this job was created (file uploaded)

completed_at.description: Timestamp when this job reached 'complete' or 'failed' status
